S.FORM: Malcolm Brogdon hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'aras mari' tpucing tay suruw. kawas tay 1992, ryax sa tay 11 nqu tay 11, Malcolm Brogdon, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Malcolm Brogdon hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'aras mari' tpucing tay suruw. kawas tay 1992, ryax sa tay 11 nqu tay 11, Malcolm Brogdon, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
